content_body: The cabin view is amazing. It is so cozy. I wish we could have stayed longer. We had such a fun time and the beds are sooooo comfy! I hope to come back soon! My family and I loved the river; we went down to throw rocks in it. I've been to three cabins and this is the best one. <3 Thank you so much! ~Fab 4 + 2
title: The Best Cabin We've Stayed In!
